title: New sensors improve early earthquake reports
description: A network of new ground sensors is improving early earthquake reports. The devices send movement data to researchers within seconds. Faster information can help emergency teams understand where damage may be strongest.
text: A network of new ground sensors is improving early earthquake reports. The devices send movement data to researchers within seconds. Faster information can help emergency teams understand where damage may be strongest.
thai_text: เครือข่ายเซนเซอร์ภาคพื้นดินชุดใหม่ช่วยให้รายงานแผ่นดินไหวเบื้องต้นรวดเร็วขึ้น
